'''鈭歡-b-ch-f''' ('''kagabchefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chark|chark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chark|chark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-b-ch-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagabchefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabchefoko|thigabchefoko]] || [[word:jigabchefoko|jigabchefoko]] || [[word:shigabchefoko|shigabchefoko]] || [[word:kigabchefoko|kigabchefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
